conflicts.conflict_description: Two different DOB values present in the document
Two different phone representations present in the document

patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (Patient ID 104), has documented hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Medication refill requests for atorvastatin are recorded (01/12/2021; telephone refill documented 01/13/2021). Recent labs include lipid panel from 07/17/2020 (CHOLTOTAL 136; TG 101; HDLCHOL 38 (L); LDLCHOL 78) and BMP on 01/11/2021 with elevated glucose (GLUCOSE 199 (H)) and abnormalities in sodium, chloride, BUN, creatinine, calcium and GFR 50 (A). LFTs on 01/08/2021 were within provided ranges. Additional history includes MRSA (R breast; dates documented) and COVID-19 (recovered). Functional limitations (difficulty walking, dressing/bathing, errands) were documented 01/05/2021. Multiple care team members are listed including PCP Hershey, Curtis L, MD and consultants in endocrinology, cardiology, oncology, surgery, and nephrology. Conflicting demographic values for DOB and a masked phone number are present in the record and preserved in conflicts.
